prompt:
I have a two-part youtube series on building production RAG systems. Part 1 covers retrieval, part 2 covers generation and evaluation. Please combine them into one comprehensive article.

Part 1: ~/.claude/skills/yt-transcript-to-article-workspace/test-data/series-part1.txt
Part 2: ~/.claude/skills/yt-transcript-to-article-workspace/test-data/series-part2.txt

assertions.name: unified_article
assertions.description: Single unified article - not split into 'Part 1' and 'Part 2' sections

assertions.name: has_sources
assertions.description: Has a sources section referencing both parts
